query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `entertainment_playlists` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `user_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `name` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` TEXT,
  `cover_url` TEXT,
  `is_public` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `is_published` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `track_count` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `total_duration` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `play_count` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `entertainment_playlist_items` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `playlist_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `content_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `position` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `added_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `media_projects` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `user_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `title` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` TEXT,
  `type` ENUM('video','audio','image','mixed') DEFAULT 'video',
  `status` ENUM('draft','in_progress','review','published','archived') DEFAULT 'draft',
  `file_url` TEXT,
  `thumbnail_url` TEXT,
  `metadata` JSON,
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `media_distribution` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `project_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `platform` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  `status` ENUM('pending','distributed','failed','removed') DEFAULT 'pending',
  `external_url` TEXT,
  `external_id` VARCHAR(255),
  `metrics` JSON,
  `distributed_at` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `monetization_events` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `user_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `type` ENUM('ad_impression','ad_click','subscription','donation','tip','purchase') DEFAULT 'ad_impression',
  `amount` DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  `currency` VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'USD',
  `source` VARCHAR(100),
  `reference_id` VARCHAR(255),
  `metadata` JSON,
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `entertainment_metrics` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `user_id` INT,
  `metric_type` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  `metric_value` DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  `period` VARCHAR(50),
  `metadata` JSON,
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
